title: helenium quadridentatum
intro: Helenium quadridentatum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wounds and infections. The health benefits of Helenium quadridentatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
